script.speaker: Townswoman Elara
script.text: Long ago, the Sunken Temple was built to seal a primordial evil. The blight is that seal weakening.

script.speaker: Townswoman Elara
script.text: Some say the old gods themselves laid the first stones. If the seal breaks completely... I do not want to imagine.

script.speaker: Shopkeeper Garrick
script.text: The storm has not let up since the blight started. Some say it is the temple weeping.

script.speaker: Shopkeeper Garrick
script.text: Trade has been slow. Adventurers are scarce, and the few who entered the temple never came back.

script.speaker: Shopkeeper Garrick
script.text: Between you and me, I have seen strange lights flickering from the temple entrance at night.

commands.text: Have you investigated the temple? The blight worsens.
Mina is still missing. She may be in the temple.
The tokens are in the depths. Earth, Fire, Shadow.

elseCommands.text: The village needs you. The blight is spreading.

script.text: The three tokens glow with ancient power. You feel the temple's energy shift.

script.speaker: Healer Mina
script.text: I shall combine the tokens into a Purification Stone.

script.speaker: Healer Mina
script.text: Focus their energy... Now! The stone is formed.
The storm breaks! Sunlight touches Thestra for the first time in years.

script.speaker: Elder Aris
script.text: You have done what no one could. The temple is sealed. The blight is gone.
Your summoned creatures are honored in a village festival.

script.speaker: Healer Mina
script.text: Oh, thank the spirits! I was trapped here for days. The blight nearly took me.

script.speaker: Healer Mina
script.text: I found a clue – a note about three tokens needed to cleanse the temple.

script.speaker: Healer Mina
script.text: Take me back to the village. I can help you with the ritual.
The curse is broken! You are a hero!
May the spirits watch over you.
